name: notion
description: Mega-slice: bundles editor + databases + templates + workspace-io + wrappers + config provider + NotionAdapter contract as one drop-in. Re-exported from frontend/slices/notion/. Portable bundle for embedding the Notion-inspired experience in other React projects, with a backend-agnostic adapter layer (Convex + localStorage reference implementations).
notes: Adapter contract at adapter/types.ts. Reference impls: adapter/convexAdapter/ (production, skip-listed via rr-sync.json convexAdapter/ pattern), adapter/localStorageAdapter/ (rr demo default). Phase 4 ship 2026-05-21 — see docs/rr-sync/2026-05-21-notion-mega-lift-plan.md. The slice-level dep on editor + databases is intentional — NotionAppProvider is the ONLY file in the codebase that imports both, breaking the historical editor↔databases bidirectional cycle by hoisting the coupling to this umbrella. lib/store dep was removed in Phase 4 (zero direct store consumption from sub-slices; the convex adapter is the sole store consumer + is skip-listed at rr lift time).
